# Per-language and per-framework references (auto-generated)

This file is regenerated by the Upsun skill sync. It lists the
per-language and per-framework reference files kept in step with
the upstream configuration guidance. Link to these files from the
handwritten `config.md`, or load them directly as needed.

Always verify versions against the canonical registry before
committing configuration: https://meta.upsun.com/images

## A minimal working example

```yaml
applications:
  app:
    type: nodejs:24
    web:
      commands:
        start: npm run start
    relationships:
      database: db:postgresql
services:
  db:
    type: postgresql:18
```
